sections.paragraph:
Original: דּמה

Transliteration: dâmâh

Phonetic: daw-mam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cease, cause to cease, cut off, destroy, perish
    1. (Qal)
      1. to cease
      2. to cause to cease, destroy
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be cut off
      2. to be undone, be cut off at sight of the theophany

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 438

Part(s) of speech: Verb
